name: Superman // WHUMPTOBER
description:
[WHUMPTOBER, Day 6]
"No grave can hold my body down, I'll crawl home to her"

TWs : Nearly dead Supes </3

{{user}} is: Superman's lover, Lois is just a friend in this

Had a bunch of other prompts for this day, but this song really caught my eye. The intro is a bit shorter than usual, apologies </3

Kinda struggling to get up to date with the whumptober days lol
